resources.string: Vigil must send you notifications in order to continue tracking the reminder timer even when the app is not open. \n \nPlease touch the \'OK\' button below, then grant Vigil permission to send you notifications in the resulting Android permission management dialog.

Vigil must send you notifications in order to continue tracking the reminder timer even when the app is not open. This is a requirement imposed by Android. The app cannot be used without permission to send you notifications. \n \nThis permission must be granted in the \'Permissions\' section of the app settings. Touch the \'OK\' button below to open the app settings.
